title: ChatContactQueryInput.sort_property doc comment lists string literals, not enum variants
description: The doc comment on ChatContactQueryInput.sort_property still reads: '/// Sort property: one of `ContactSortProperty::LastSeenAt`, `Login`, `LastActiveAt`.' The backtick-quoted `Login` and `LastActiveAt` are not full paths, inconsistent with `ContactSortProperty::LastSeenAt`. rustdoc will not resolve bare `Login` as a link. Use consistent full paths or write them as `ContactSortProperty::LastSeenAt | Login | LastActiveAt` with an intra-doc link to ContactSortProperty.
close_reason: Fixed: sort_property doc comment now uses full paths ContactSortProperty::LastSeenAt | Login | LastActiveAt
